methods.description: Obsidian callout blocks — extracts the line(s) following the callout marker

methods.heading: ## Open Questions
methods.description: Extracts bullet lines under any '## Open Questions' heading in a note or journal entry

open_question_extraction.notes: Freeform questions are NOT extracted — only callouts and section bullets. Journal is included in scan.

notes: vault_path is relative to home. stale_threshold_days: notes older than this are flagged. Update open_question_extraction.methods if conventions change.
